zh.lifeSummary: Margaret de Balliol是Agnes de Picquigney的女兒，於1167年出生在英國諾圖波藍德白維爾。她於1192年之前與Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale在英國諾圖波藍德卡素結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1262年在她的家鄉享年95歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margaret de Balliol是Agnes de Picquigney的女儿，于1167年出生在英国諾圖波藍德白維爾。她于1192年之前与Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale在英国諾圖波藍德卡素结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1262年在她的家乡享年95岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Margaret de Balliol was born in 1167, in Bywell, Northumberland, England as the daughter of Agnes de Picquigney. She married Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale before 1192, in Castle, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1262, in her hometown, at the age of 95.

fr.lifeSummary: Margaret de Balliol est née en 1167, à Bywell, Northumberland, Angleterre, fille de Agnes de Picquigney. Elle a épousé Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale avant 1192, à Castle, Northumberland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1262, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 95 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margaret de Balliol wurde 1167 in Bywell, Northumberland, England, als Tochter von Agnes de Picquigney geboren. Sie hat vor 1192 in Castle, Northumberland, England Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1262 im Alter von 95 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Margaret de Balliol è nata il nel 1167 nel Bywell, Northumberland, England come figlia di Agnes de Picquigney. Lei sposato Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale prima del 1192, nel Castle, Northumberland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1262, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 95 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Balliolは1167年にイギリスノースウンバーランドブイウエルでAgnes de Picquigneyの娘として生まれた。1192年以前にイギリスノースウンバーランドカストルでRichard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1262年に故郷で95歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Balliol(은)는 1167년 영국 노르스벌랜드 비웰에서 Agnes de Picquigney의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1192년 이전 영국 노르스벌랜드 카스틀에서 Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1262년 그녀의 고향에서 95세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margaret de Balliol nasceu em 1167, em Bywell, Northumberland, Inglaterra filha de Agnes de Picquigney. Ela casou-se com Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale antes 1192, em Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1262, em sua cidade natal, com 95 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Margaret de Balliol родилась в 1167 г. в местности бивелл, нортумбирланд, Англия. Её мать звали Agnes de Picquigney. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale перед 1192 г. в местности кастл, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1262 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 95 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Margaret de Balliol nació en 1167, en Bywell, Northumberland, Inglaterra como hija de Agnes de Picquigney. Se casó con Richard de Umfreville Lord of Redesdale antes de 1192, en Castle, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1262, en su pueblo, a la edad de 95 años.
